Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> OOF is failing: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//108207-1/healthcheck/full/full/report.html#tags?health-oof

unfortunately it is not linked to this patch
regression on OOF occured several days on Master - my bad I missed it
see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/107854 to see how I missed some regression on Master
I suspect https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/107990 and AFF new version to be the root cause but I am not 100% sure
On the daily Master of the 20th of May (before the AAF merge), the OOF test was OK https://gating-results.onap.eu/results/onap_daily_pod4_master-560457630-05-20-2020_10-05/healthcheck/full/full/report.html

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review+2
> 
> OOF pods + HC are OK
> waiting for OOF team to +1

I suspect slowliness..
when you see dmaap errors in small/medium then OK in full it means that it took time to start

as the related HC + healthdist + postinstall is OK, it is not so bad at the end
but these slowliness could explain other erros in E2E tests
-clearwater => timeout on instantiation (still in Progress on SO)
- nbi => error due to the DB

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

The version bumps looks good to me.
